options.name: help
options.description: Print this help text and exit

options.name: version
options.description: Print program version and exit

options.name: update
options.description: Update this program to the latest version

options.name: ignore_errors
options.description: Ignore download and postprocessing errors

options.name: abort_on_error
options.description: Abort downloading of further videos if an error occurs

options.name: no_abort_on_error
options.description: Continue with next video on download errors

options.name: quiet
options.description: Activate quiet mode

options.name: no_warnings
options.description: Ignore warnings

options.name: simulate
options.description: Do not download the video and do not write anything to disk

options.name: proxy
options.description: Use the specified HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS proxy

options.name: socket_timeout
options.description: Time to wait before giving up, in seconds

options.name: force_ipv4
options.description: Make all connections via IPv4

options.name: force_ipv6
options.description: Make all connections via IPv6

options.name: playlist_items
options.description: Comma separated playlist_index of the items to download

options.name: min_filesize
options.description: Abort download if the file is smaller than SIZE (e.g. 50k or 44.6M)

options.name: max_filesize
options.description: Abort download if the file is larger than SIZE

options.name: date
options.description: Download only videos uploaded on this date

options.name: no_playlist
options.description: Download only the video, if the URL refers to a video and a playlist

options.name: yes_playlist
options.description: Download the playlist, if the URL refers to a video and a playlist

options.name: concurrent_fragments
options.description: Number of fragments of a dash/hlsnative video to download concurrently (default is 1)

options.name: limit_rate
options.description: Maximum download rate in bytes per second (e.g. 50K or 4.2M)

options.name: retries
options.description: Number of retries (default is 10), or "infinite"

options.name: batch_file
options.description: File containing URLs to download, one URL per line

options.name: paths
options.description: The paths where the files should be downloaded

options.name: output
options.description: Output filename template

options.name: restrict_filenames
options.description: Restrict filenames to only ASCII characters

options.name: no_overwrites
options.description: Do not overwrite any files

options.name: continue
options.description: Resume partially downloaded files (default)

options.name: cookies
options.description: Netscape formatted file to read cookies from and dump cookie jar in

options.name: print
options.description: Field name or output template to print to screen

options.name: dump_json
options.description: Quiet, but print JSON information for each video

options.name: verbose
options.description: Print various debugging information

options.name: format
options.description: Video format code, see "FORMAT SELECTION"

options.name: format_sort
options.description: Sort the formats by the fields given

options.name: video_multistreams
options.description: Allow multiple video streams to be merged into a single file

options.name: list_formats
options.description: List available formats of each video

options.name: merge_output_format
options.description: Containers that may be used when merging formats (e.g. mp4, mkv, webm)

options.name: write_subs
options.description: Write subtitle file

options.name: write_auto_subs
options.description: Write automatically generated subtitle file

options.name: sub_langs
options.description: Languages of the subtitles to download (e.g. "en.*,ja")

options.name: extract_audio
options.description: Convert video files to audio-only files

options.name: audio_format
options.description: Format to convert the audio to when -x is used (best, aac, flac, mp3, m4a, opus, wav)

options.name: audio_quality
options.description: Specify ffmpeg audio quality to use when converting audio (0 best to 10 worst)

options.name: embed_subs
options.description: Embed subtitles in the video

options.name: embed_thumbnail
options.description: Embed thumbnail in the video as cover art

options.name: embed_metadata
options.description: Embed metadata to the video file

options.name: keep_video
options.description: Keep the intermediate video file on disk after post-processing
